name: Yu Jin
lore:
A veteran who became one of Wei's Five
Generals. At Fan Castle, he surrendered
to Guan Yu, losing Cao Cao's trust. Upon
return, Cao Pi shamed him with paintings
of his surrender. Yu Jin died of
humiliation.
battleCry:
Years of battle have honed my blade.
Feel the difference!
victoryCryDuel: Did you think you could beat ME?
victoryCryBattle: A castle like this is nothing to me!

skill.name: Stealth
skill.description:
Your POW increases and you gain Stealth.
(Enemies can't see you. However you briefly appear when Ambush reveal conditions are met. Enemy Skills can still target you.)

name: Wang Yi
lore:
A female warrior of rare strength and
cunning. After Ma Chao's defeat, she
devised the scheme that drove him from
Xiliang. When he attacked Qishan, she
led troops herself, repelling his
assault and routing his forces.
battleCry:
Xiliang barbarian! Never underestimate
a woman's pride and resolve.
victoryCryDuel: You thought you could defeat me?
victoryCryBattle: A woman's resolve cannot be denied!

skill.name: Fury Payback
skill.description: Greatly lowers POW and SPD of enemies in range.

name: Jia Xu
lore:
As Zhang Xiu's advisor, he tormented Cao
Cao but later defected. He became Wei's
finest strategist. Against Ma Chao, his
scheme sowed discord with Han Sui,
shattering their alliance and ensuring
Wei's victory.
battleCry:
Heh heh heh... The human heart
is so easily read.
victoryCryBattle: Heh... regret your foolish tactics.

skill.name: Divide Ploy
skill.description: Lowers POW and INT and SPD of enemies in range. Effect is halved if only 1 Unit is targeted.
skill.shortDescription:
Lowers POW and INT and SPD
effect halved if only 1 target

name: Guo Jia
lore:
Cao Cao's brilliant strategist who
predicted Sun Ce's death and the Yuan
succession crisis. He died at 38 during
the northern campaign. Cao Cao lamented
that with Guo Jia, Red Cliffs would
never have been lost.
battleCry:
Nothing escapes my foresight.
I see all outcomes.
victoryCryBattle: Nothing escapes my farsighted eye.

skill.name: Flash Speed
skill.description: Ally POW in range briefly increases and Horse units also gain SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW briefly increases and
Horse units also gain SPD

name: Lady Guo
lore:
Wife of Cao Pi. Her beauty won his
favor, rising to Imperial Consort.
Ambitious, she schemed against Empress
Zhen, manipulating Cao Pi until he
suspected his empress. She drove Lady
Zhen to suicide and took the throne.
battleCry:
There can only be one queen,
don't you agree?
victoryCryBattle: How kind. I'll take everything now.

skill.name: Weaken Ploy
skill.description: Lowers POW of enemies in range.

name: Yue Jin
lore:
A homegrown hero of Cao Cao's army.
Small but fierce, he was always first
into battle. At Guandu he slew Chunyu
Qiong. At Hefei, he joined Zhang Liao
and Li Dian in repelling Wu's invasion.
battleCry:
Forward, men!
Retreat is not in our vocabulary!
victoryCryDuel: Think you can stop MY advance?!
victoryCryBattle: Retreat? That word means nothing to me!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Xiahou Yuan
lore:
A trusted commander since Cao Cao raised
his banner. With cousin Xiahou Dun, he
formed Wei's twin pillars. He never knew
retreat, mastering lightning strikes. He
crushed Ma Chao and captured Pang De
among many victories.
battleCry:
My storm assault will crush you
in the blink of an eye!
victoryCryBattle: Next battle! Onwards, always onwards!

skill.name: Wild Shots
skill.description: Your POW increases and bow attacks all enemy Units in range.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
bow attacks all enemies in range

name: Xiahou Yuan
lore:
A pillar of Wei. This veteran fought in
every major campaign, excelling against
Ma Chao and at Hanzhong. Entrusted with
Hanzhong's defense, his reckless courage
proved his undoing when he fell to Huang
Zhong.
battleCry:
No ordinary general can match
the fury of my assault!
victoryCryDuel: No one can match my speed!
victoryCryBattle: You cannot fathom my assault!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Xiahou Dun
lore:
The warrior who lost an eye fighting
with Cao Cao from the start. Humble in
daily life, he became a demon on the
battlefield. An arrow took his left eye
against Lu Bu, yet his prowess only grew
fiercer.
battleCry: Mock my one eye and you die!
victoryCryDuel: Underestimate my one eye, did you?
victoryCryBattle: Surrender! I'll spare your life.

skill.name: One Eye Roar
skill.description: Briefly stops enemies in range from moving. POW increases based on number of enemies. Speed also increases past a certain threshold.
skill.shortDescription:
Stops enemies and POW increases
SPD up past threshold

name: Xiahou Dun
lore:
Wei's foremost commander. At Xuzhou, an
arrow pierced his eye, but he ate it and
kept fighting, slaying his attacker.
Despite his ferocity, he was sincere and
personable, Cao Cao's trusted confidant.
battleCry:
This eye was my parents' gift.
I won't throw it away!
victoryCryDuel: This won't quench my battle thirst!
victoryCryBattle: Is that all? I'm just getting started!

skill.name: Dispel Gaze
skill.description: Removes enemy Skill effects from enemy Units in range.

name: Niu Jin
lore:
A Wei officer who served under Cao Ren
defending Nan Commandery. When Wu forces
attacked, he eagerly rode out to meet
them but was surrounded. Cao Ren
personally led a charge to break the
encirclement and rescue him.
battleCry:
HRAAAGH!
I'll charge in and smash 'em all!
victoryCryBattle: RAAAH! Know your place!

skill.name: Reckless Rush
skill.description: POW and SPD greatly increase. However you are forced to move in the direction you face on activation.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase
but forced to move straight

name: Xu Chu
lore:
Called the Tiger Fool for his bestial
strength and simple manner. He served as
Cao Cao's bodyguard captain, always at
his lord's side, saving him from danger
time and again. When Cao Cao died, he
wept until he coughed blood.
battleCry: I'll protect my lord's life!
victoryCryBattle: This castle is MINE now!!

skill.name: Tiger Strength
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases.

name: Cai Wenji
lore:
Daughter of Cai Yong. The most talented
woman of Late Han, she composed famous
works like Eighteen Songs of a Nomad
Flute. Captured by the Xiongnu, she
became a khan's wife until ransomed.
Back home, she wrote prolifically.
battleCry:
Well, that's about right.
*yawn* Time for a break...
victoryCryBattle: Wait... did I actually win?

skill.name: Heaven Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) All allies except yourself gain increased SPD.

name: Cai Mao
lore:
Liu Biao's officer who saw Liu Bei as a
threat. After Liu Biao died, he
surrendered to Cao Cao and became naval
admiral. Before Red Cliffs, Zhou Yu's
scheme made Cao Cao suspect him of
treason, and he was executed.
battleCry: Behold Jing Province's naval might!
victoryCryBattle: We can still fight on!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Sima Yi
lore:
After Emperor Rui's death, he was named
regent alongside Cao Shuang. Sidelined
by Cao Shuang's faction, he feigned
illness and frailty to lull them. Then
he struck with a coup, purging Cao
Shuang's allies. His power in Wei became
absolute.
battleCry:
Before my intellect,
you are but a child.
victoryCryBattle: What matters is who wins in the end.

skill.name: Fluid Tactics
skill.description: Removes enemy Skill effects in range and lowers POW. If allies outnumber enemies in range increases ally POW and INT and SPD.

name: Xun Yu
lore:
Wei's greatest civil minister, managing
both state and military affairs. From
youth he was hailed as one destined to
serve a king. He guarded Cao Cao's rear
while his lord campaigned, saving the
army from crisis time and again.
battleCry:
To bring peace to this chaos,
I shall do my utmost.
victoryCryBattle: For peace, I walk the path of conquest.

skill.name: Mystery Counter
skill.description: [Deny] (Can only use when enemy uses Skill in range. Cannot counter a counter.) Negates enemy Skill and reflects damage-dealing Skills.

name: Xun You
lore:
Xun Yu's nephew, yet six years his
senior. Imprisoned for plotting against
Dong Zhuo, he later joined Cao Cao on
Xun Yu's word. He seemed slow witted but
hid keen wit. Cao Cao praised him as
soft on the outside, steel within.
battleCry:
Ha ha ha, well well,
you've got me there!
victoryCryBattle: Things have a way of working out.

skill.name: Great Flood
skill.description: Deals water damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Zhong Hui
lore:
Zhong Yao's youngest son, called a
prodigy from childhood. He became Sima
Zhao's confidant, crushing rebellions
and conquering Shu with Deng Ai.
Ambitious, he plotted rebellion with
Jiang Wei, but Sima Zhao saw through him
and had him killed.
battleCry: Not betrayal, just survival!
victoryCryDuel: The gap in talent is too vast!
victoryCryBattle: Your only choice now is to serve ME!

skill.name: Water Bane
skill.description: Deals water damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Xu Huang
lore:
A great warrior with his axe who
excelled at Guandu. At Red Cliffs he led
the vanguard, then protected Cao Cao
during the retreat. Though fierce, he
was cautious by nature, always planning
for the worst. He never suffered a major
defeat.
battleCry:
No reckless pursuit!
Strike only when victory is certain!
victoryCryDuel: Heh. Feel my axe, did you?
victoryCryBattle: Victory always favors the prepared!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Lady Zhen
lore:
One of the era's great beauties, she won
Emperor Cao Pi's devoted love. Her
beauty charmed even Cao Cao and Cao Zhi.
Yet she was noble in spirit, fair and
gracious, always helping those around
her.
battleCry:
Allow me to assist
in your ambitions.
victoryCryBattle: That went rather well, I think.

skill.name: Outnumber Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) POW increases the fewer allies compared to enemies on battlefield.
skill.shortDescription:
[Dance] POW increases when
outnumbered by enemies

name: Cao Hong
lore:
Cao Cao's cousin. When Cao Cao was
unhorsed fleeing Dong Zhuo, Cao Hong
gave him his own mount, saving his life.
He guarded Cao Cao across the river,
evaded Dong Zhuo's pursuit, and
survived. A man of loyalty and valor.
battleCry:
The world can do without me,
but not without you, my lord!
victoryCryDuel: I cannot afford to die here!
victoryCryBattle: A difficult victory... but a victory!

skill.name: Kamikaze
skill.description: Your POW and Siege power increase but you are forced to move forward during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and Siege up but
forced to move forward

name: Cao Ang
lore:
Cao Cao's eldest son. When Zhang Xiu's
night raid caught Cao Cao off guard and
his horse was shot, Cao Ang rushed to
his side and gave his own mount. Cao Cao
escaped, but Cao Ang fell to enemy
arrows.
battleCry:
Those who defy my father's path
shall answer to me!
victoryCryDuel: The brigand targeting Father is down!
victoryCryBattle: Father! I've cleared the way!

skill.name: Take My Horse!
skill.description:
Increases POW and SPD of ally with highest POW except yourself.
You die on activation.

name: Cao Zhang
lore:
Son of Cao Cao. Born for war, he could
wrestle wild beasts. He yielded his
claim to the throne to pursue the
warrior's path. After crushing the
Wuhuan rebellion, he rushed to Hanzhong
and defeated Liu Feng's forces.
battleCry:
Ha! Battle at last!
Forward! One or two heads
won't satisfy me!
victoryCryBattle: War is good! My heart soars!

skill.name: Flash Strength
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases for a short time.

name: Cao Zhi
lore:
Third son of Cao Cao. A literary
prodigy, but his carefree nature cost
him the succession. Cao Pi nearly had
him executed but challenged him to
compose a poem in seven steps. He did
so, and was spared.
battleCry:
Poetry springs forth
at any moment.
victoryCryBattle: I feel a new poem taking shape...

skill.name: Dispel Ploy
skill.description:
Removes enemy Skill effects from
enemy Units in range.

name: Cao Ren
lore:
Cao Cao's cousin. He raised troops to
join the campaign against Dong Zhuo and
fought fiercely in countless battles.
Though appointed governor, Cao Cao
valued his courage and wisdom too much
to let him go. He rose to Grand Marshal
of Wei.
battleCry:
Cao Cao's path to dominion!
I shall carve it open!
victoryCryBattle: Feel the shock of my power!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Cao Cao
lore:
One of the Three Kingdoms' great heroes.
Master of sword, strategy, governance,
poetry, and art, he was called a hero
beyond his age. His cunning crushed
rival warlords one by one, building Wei
into China's mightiest power.
battleCry:
Now is the time to soar!
My ambition reaches a thousand miles!
victoryCryDuel: This victory too is my destiny!
victoryCryBattle: Now I soar! My ambition spans a realm!

skill.name: Lord's Appeal
skill.description: Increases POW of all Wei allies in range.

name: Cao Pi
lore:
Cao Cao's second son. He forced Emperor
Xian to abdicate, becoming Emperor Wen.
Educated by his father, he mastered many
arts. As emperor, he enacted wise
policies and promoted talented men, but
died at just 40.
battleCry:
I, Cao Pi,
shall forge a new era!
victoryCryDuel: My empire has no place for you.
victoryCryBattle: Kneel before me, ruler of the land!

skill.name: Wei War Order
skill.description: Increases POW of Wei allies in range for a long time.
skill.shortDescription: Wei ally POW increases for long time

name: Zhang He
lore:
Cao Cao likened him to Han Xin, the
great Han general. He adapted to any
situation, reading terrain and battle
flow. From the Yellow Turbans to his
death during Zhuge Liang's campaigns, he
fought for over 40 years. A warrior to
the bone.
battleCry:
On the edge of death,
I feel most alive.
victoryCryBattle: Another win. I've lost count by now.

skill.name: Wei Elite
skill.description: Your POW increases for a long time.

name: Zhang Chunhua
lore:
Wife of Sima Yi. When a maid saw her
husband faking illness to avoid Cao
Cao's summons, she killed the girl to
silence her. Sima Yi was so terrified of
her that he could never stand up to his
wife.
battleCry:
Hee hee, don't worry dear.
I've already wrung the necks
of those dirty little rats...
victoryCryBattle: My quiet preparations paid off~

skill.name: Stealth
skill.description:
Your POW increases and you gain Stealth.
(Enemies can't see you. However you briefly appear when Ambush reveal conditions are met. Enemy Skills can still target you.)

name: Zhang Liao
lore:
A Wei general so feared that Wu soldiers
cried 'Zhang Liao is coming!' At Hefei,
Sun Quan laid siege with 100,000 men.
Zhang Liao sallied with just 800,
smashing the Wu army. His assault was so
fierce he nearly took Sun Quan's head.
battleCry:
My target: Sun Quan's head.
Anyone in my way dies!
victoryCryDuel: All who block my path shall fall!
victoryCryBattle: None can stand against my might!

skill.name: Speed Order
skill.description: Ally POW in range increases and Horse units also gain SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
Horse units also gain SPD

name: Cheng Yu
lore:
Cao Cao's strategist, recommended by Xun
Yu. In youth he dreamed of holding the
sun, so Cao Cao added 'sun' to his name.
At Cangting, he devised the 'Ten Sided
Ambush': ten hidden forces crushing Yuan
Shao's army in one masterstroke.
battleCry:
I see it... my sun rising
to the throne!
victoryCryBattle: My lord, heaven awaits us.

skill.name: Stealth
skill.description:
Your POW increases and you gain Stealth.
(Enemies can't see you. However you briefly appear when Ambush reveal conditions are met. Enemy Skills can still target you.)

name: Dian Wei
lore:
Cao Cao's mighty bodyguard. He stood
watch day and night. When Zhang Xiu's
night raid caught them off guard, Dian
Wei held the gate alone while Cao Cao
escaped. He died on his feet, fighting
to his last breath.
battleCry:
My lord... may fortune
favor you always...!
victoryCryBattle: While I stand, defeat is impossible!

skill.name: Flash Strength
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases for a short time.

name: Deng Ai
lore:
The Wei general who destroyed Shu. He
defeated Jiang Wei repeatedly on the
front lines. Under Sima Zhao, he
conquered Shu by marching through
treacherous cliffs, crushing Zhuge Zhan
at Chengdu and forcing Liu Shan's
surrender.
battleCry:
What awaits at the end
of this battle...?
victoryCryDuel: Why throw your life away so carelessly?
victoryCryBattle: What awaits us at war's end?

skill.name: Stealth Speed
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase and you gain Stealth. (Enemies can't see you. However you briefly appear when Ambush reveal conditions are met. Enemy Skills can still target you.)
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase and
gain Stealth

name: Lady Bian
lore:
Cao Cao's wife and mother of Cao Pi, Cao
Zhang, and Cao Zhi. Once a humble
singer, she won Cao Cao's heart. Wise
and modest, even as empress she never
craved power, quietly supporting her
husband from the shadows.
battleCry:
A king's wife desires nothing
but to aid her husband.
What could be worth more than that?
victoryCryDuel: A lovely song just came to me~
victoryCryBattle: Let me sing you a victory ballad~

skill.name: Sunset Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Ally Siege gauge fills faster but Siege power decreases.
skill.shortDescription:
[Dance] Siege gauge fills faster
but Siege power decreases

name: Pang De
lore:
Once Ma Chao's right hand, he joined Wei
after defeat. To prove his resolve, he
brought a coffin to battle. He fought
Guan Yu for a hundred bouts without
yielding. Captured by trickery, he
refused to submit and was executed.
battleCry:
Either I die, or Guan Yu does.
There's no other outcome!
victoryCryDuel: Who wants to fill the next coffin?
victoryCryBattle: My resolve shall never be broken!

skill.name: Kamikaze
skill.description: Your POW and Siege power increase but you are forced to move forward during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and Siege up but
forced to move forward

name: Man Chong
lore:
Recommended by Liu Ye to serve Cao Cao.
Upright and incorruptible, at Fan Castle
when Cao Ren wanted to retreat, he
explained the position's importance and
held firm. At Hefei he used stratagems
to repel Wu, a true master of defense.
battleCry:
Leave it to me!
I'll defend this place to the death!
victoryCryBattle: Defense creates opportunity!

skill.name: Chain Ploy
skill.description: Lowers SPD of enemies in range.

name: Yang Hu
lore:
Cai Yong's grandson, married to Sima
Shi's sister. Across the Yangzi, he and
Lu Kang respected each other as rivals.
After Lu Kang died, he urged an attack
on Wu, but passed away before seeing it
done. Du Yu carried on his will.
battleCry:
Even against enemies,
I act with honor and trust.
victoryCryBattle: In battle, I show no favoritism.

skill.name: Flash Order
skill.description: Briefly increases POW of allies in range.

name: Li Dian
lore:
A general from Cao Cao's earliest days.
A scholar at heart, always calm in
battle, respected by his men. He served
as lieutenant in many campaigns,
cautioning rash officers. Perhaps too
cautious; no great victories bear his
name.
battleCry:
General, you're too far forward!
Please, show some restraint!
victoryCryBattle: Caution in battle leads to victory.

skill.name: Counter Ploy
skill.description: [Deny] (Can only use when enemy uses Skill in range. Cannot counter a counter.) Negates enemy Skill and reflects damage-dealing Skills.

name: Liu Ye
lore:
Descendant of Emperor Guangwu. He served
three Wei emperors. As Han royalty, he
kept his distance, though close to Wu's
Lu Su. A keen judge of character who
urged conquering Zhang Lu and foresaw
Meng Da's betrayal.
battleCry: Heh, just what a fool would think.
victoryCryBattle: You saw this coming, didn't you?

skill.name: See Through
skill.description: [Deny] (Can only use when enemy uses Skill in range. Cannot counter a counter.) Negates enemy Skill activation.

name: Yi Ji
lore:
A retainer of Liu Biao. Impressed by Liu
Bei's insight, he joined him after Liu
Biao died. A skilled diplomat, he
impressed Sun Quan with his eloquence.
Later, he helped Zhuge Liang and Fa
Zheng draft Shu's legal code.
battleCry:
Well now, I hope they're
the reasonable type...
victoryCryBattle: Happy to be of service.

skill.name: Apt Support
skill.description: Recovers HP of ally with highest POW in range.

name: Wang Ping
lore:
A loyal man who supported Zhuge Liang.
Risen from the ranks, he advised Ma Su
during the Northern Campaign. At
Jieting, he warned against Ma Su's
recklessness but was ignored. Despite
that defeat, he won many later
victories.
battleCry:
Fine then!
I'll hold this position myself!
victoryCryDuel: You were a bit too reckless...
victoryCryBattle: Mission complete! Returning now!

skill.name: Great Wheel
skill.description: Your POW increases and performs invincible spear attacks in all directions.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
attacks all directions with spear

name: Xiahou Yueji
lore:
Zhang Fei's wife and Xiahou Yuan's
niece. She met Zhang Fei by chance while
separated from Liu Bei, and he fell for
her. One of Liu Bei's sworn brothers,
one of Cao Cao's closest kin, yet fate
united them across enemy lines.
battleCry:
Well, this must be fate.
I'll fight alongside you!
victoryCryBattle: Guess fate wasn't on your side.

skill.name: Lightning
skill.description: Drops 3 lightning bolts in range each dealing lightning damage to an enemy. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Guan Yu
lore:
A hero who swore the Peach Garden Oath
with Liu Bei and Zhang Fei. Riding Red
Hare and wielding the Green Dragon
Blade, he was called a god of war, worth
ten thousand. Escorting Liu Bei's wives,
he broke through five passes to rejoin
his lord.
battleCry:
None can match the might
of Guan Yu!
victoryCryDuel: Drawing your blade on Guan Yu? Folly!
victoryCryBattle: Drop your weapons! Yield to Guan Yu!

skill.name: Loyal Order
skill.description: Ally POW in range increases and HP recovers beyond max.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
HP recovers beyond max

name: Guan Yu
lore:
Liu Bei and Zhang Fei's sworn brother,
Shu's foremost warrior. His loyalty was
absolute. When he surrendered to Cao
Cao, Cao Cao showered him with gifts to
win him over, but Guan Yu returned them
all and went back to Liu Bei.
battleCry:
All my strength,
I devote to my brother!
victoryCryBattle: While Guan Yu stands, defeat is not!

skill.name: Long Spear
skill.description: Your POW increases and spear lengthens.

name: Guan Yinping
lore:
Guan Yu's third daughter. A warrior like
her father, she joined Zhuge Liang's
Nanman campaign. When Sun Quan proposed
marriage to his son, Guan Yu refused: 'I
won't give a tiger's cub to a dog's
pup!' This worsened relations with Wu.
battleCry:
My father's fierce blood
isn't just for show!
victoryCryBattle: Weakling! Father wouldn't stop here!

skill.name: Young Awaken
skill.description: POW increases based on highest POW among Shu allies. Past a threshold also performs invincible spear attacks in all directions.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
invincible spear attack at threshold

name: Lady Gan
lore:
Liu Bei's wife and mother of Liu Shan,
who would inherit Shu. A gentle woman
who encouraged her struggling husband
and remained devoted even when captured.
An unseen pillar of support, she died
young after the Battle of Red Cliffs.
battleCry:
It'll be fine, dear.
Everything will work out~
victoryCryBattle: Heehee, thanks for letting me win~

skill.name: Healing Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) All allies except yourself continuously recover HP.

name: Guan Ping
lore:
Guan Yu's adopted son. He won many
victories alongside Liu Feng, Liu Bei's
adopted son. When Wu ambushed Guan Yu
from behind at Jing Province, father and
son fought to the end together, dying
side by side.
battleCry:
Engrave it in your eyes!
This is how Guan Ping lives!
victoryCryDuel: Think you can beat the War God's son?
victoryCryBattle: Father! Guan Ping has triumphed!

skill.name: Long Spear
skill.description: Your POW increases and spear lengthens.

name: Jian Yong
lore:
From Liu Bei's hometown, the oldest of
his retainers. He served as Liu Bei's
sounding board and often as diplomat.
Careless and arrogant, yet he offended
no one; his charm and wit won everyone
over.
battleCry:
Well, well, well.
This should do just fine.
victoryCryBattle: Wahaha! About what I expected!

skill.name: Bloodless Fall
skill.description: Your Siege power greatly increases and POW decreases. Effect is greater the less battle time remains.
skill.shortDescription:
Siege up and POW down
greater effect with less time left

name: Wei Yan
lore:
A fierce general who distinguished
himself in the Shu campaign. Liu Bei
valued him so highly he chose him over
Zhang Fei to guard Hanzhong. After Liu
Bei's death, he joined Zhuge Liang's
campaigns, slaying Wang Shuang among
other feats.
battleCry:
Anyone reckless enough
to fight me!?
victoryCryBattle: This castle is MINE!

skill.name: I Alone
skill.description: All your Units in range die and your POW increases. Effect is greater the more Units died. Speed also increases past a certain threshold.
skill.shortDescription:
Allies die and POW increases
SPD up past threshold

name: Wei Yan
lore:
A fierce general under Liu Bei. Rising
from captain to Governor of Hanzhong
through merit. Proud and headstrong,
after Liu Bei's death he clashed with
Zhuge Liang, who rejected his bold
Changan surprise attack plan.
battleCry:
Weaklings!
You can't stop Wei Yan!
victoryCryBattle: Is there no one who can defeat me?!

skill.name: Great Wheel
skill.description: Your POW increases and performs invincible spear attacks in all directions.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
attacks all directions with spear

name: Jiang Wei
lore:
Zhuge Liang's disciple. Skilled in war
and letters, he once dueled Zhao Yun to
a draw. After his master's death, he
became Grand General, continuing the war
against Wei with limited success. He
died in a failed rebellion with Zhong
Hui.
battleCry:
The mission to destroy Wei...
I accept it!
victoryCryDuel: Couldn't read my spear, could you?
victoryCryBattle: Battle's over. Tend the wounded.

skill.name: Provoke
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Yan Yan
lore:
Once under Liu Zhang. He refused
surrender, demanding to be beheaded, but
Zhang Fei convinced him to join Liu Bei.
At Tiandangshan, he partnered with Huang
Zhong: two old warriors charging boldly,
slaying the enemy commander.
battleCry:
Come, Lord Huang Zhong!
Let's scatter these youngsters!
victoryCryDuel: Greenhorn! Come back when you grow!
victoryCryBattle: This old man won't lose to pups!

skill.name: Fury Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and HP recovers.

name: Wu Yi
lore:
A general under Liu Bei. He served Liu
Zhang until captured during Liu Bei's
invasion. His sister became Liu Bei's
consort, and he rose to General of the
Left. After Liu Bei's death, he served
Zhuge Liang on many fronts.
battleCry:
If I can aid Lord Liu Bei,
I'll take any role.
victoryCryBattle: A decent result, I'd say.

skill.name: Apt Support
skill.description: Recovers HP of ally with highest POW in range.

name: Huang Yueying
lore:
Wife of the genius strategist Zhuge
Liang. Versed in astronomy, geography,
and military arts, she supported him
with her vast knowledge. Said to be an
inventor, she created the wooden ox and
flowing horse, and mechanical puppets.
battleCry:
Ah! I may have just thought
of the perfect plan!
victoryCryBattle: Hmm, how should I renovate this?

skill.name: Yellow Accel
skill.description: Speed increases.

name: Huang Zhong
lore:
Shu's aged veteran. A master archer
under Liu Biao. Dueling Guan Yu, his
horse stumbled, but Guan Yu spared him.
Later, though he could have killed Guan
Yu with his bow, he shot only his cap,
repaying the debt of honor.
battleCry:
Lord Guan Yu,
the debt is repaid!
victoryCryBattle: Hah, still green behind the ears.

skill.name: Zero Range
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases and bow range decreases.

name: Huang Zhong
lore:
One of Shu's Five Tiger Generals, proof
that age only sharpens the blade. At
Hanzhong, he teamed with Yan Yan to slay
Xiahou Yuan. At Yiling, old but
undeterred, he charged deep into enemy
lines and died in battle.
battleCry:
Come, Lord Yan Yan!
We can't leave this to youngsters!
victoryCryBattle: Age only makes ME stronger!

skill.name: Aged Valor
skill.description:
(Old but vigorous)
Your POW increases and HP recovers beyond max.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
HP recovers beyond max

name: Zhou Cang
lore:
Once a bandit who sought out Guan Yu and
became his right hand. In battle with
Pang De, when Guan Yu flooded the field
and Pang De tried to escape by boat,
Zhou Cang rammed him with a raft and
captured him after a fight in the water.
battleCry:
HRAAAAH!
Watch how I live, dammit!
victoryCryBattle: HYAAAH! Witness my way of life!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Zhuge Liang
lore:
A protagonist of the era alongside Liu
Bei and Cao Cao. Won by Liu Bei's three
visits, he devised the plan to divide
the realm. His genius guided Liu Bei to
found Shu and become Emperor. After Liu
Bei died, he continued the war against
Wei.
battleCry:
Cao, Sun, and Liu.
This shall be the 'Three Kingdoms.'
victoryCryBattle: With this, the realm is divided!

skill.name: 8 Trigrams
skill.description: Effect depends on allies in range. 1 Unit: POW up and HP recovers beyond max. 2 Units: POW and SPD up. 3 Units: POW up and can't be targeted by Skills. 4+ Units: POW up and HP gradually recovers.

name: Xu Shu
lore:
Liu Bei's first strategist. With
brilliant tactics, he broke Cao Ren's
'Eight Gates Golden Lock' formation and
won at Xinye. Cao Cao schemed to
separate him from Liu Bei, but before
leaving, Xu Shu recommended Zhuge Liang
as his replacement.
battleCry:
It seems they've been
doing quite a bit of thinking.
victoryCryBattle: I see it... your realm, my lord.

skill.name: Lightning
skill.description: Drops 3 lightning bolts in range each dealing lightning damage to an enemy. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Sun Ren
lore:
Sun Quan's sister. She married Liu Bei
to seal the alliance. Bold and brave,
she matched any Wu general in combat.
Though it was a political marriage, she
came to love Liu Bei as a hero. When he
died, she threw herself into the Yangzi.
battleCry:
Now go!
Win no matter what, and come back!
victoryCryDuel: My blade isn't bad, is it?
victoryCryBattle: Don't underestimate me for being a woman!

skill.name: Paralyze Arrow
skill.description: Your POW and bow range increase and arrows slow enemies hit.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and range increase and
arrows slow enemies

name: Zhao Yun
lore:
A brave general under Liu Bei, both calm
and bold. He served Liu Bei and Zhuge
Liang closely. At Changban, he rode
alone through Cao Cao's army to rescue
the infant Liu Shan, carrying the baby
through enemy ranks to safety.
battleCry:
Now is when Zhao Zilong
shows his true mettle!
victoryCryBattle: Witness the true power of Zhao Zilong!

skill.name: Horse Unity
skill.description: POW and SPD increase and negates Spear Counter damage.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase and
negates Spear Counter damage

name: Zhao Yun
lore:
A Shu hero, bold yet careful. His valor
matched Guan Yu and Zhang Fei, making
him one of the Five Tigers. At Changban,
when Liu Bei left his family behind,
Zhao Yun charged alone into enemy lines
and rescued the infant Liu Shan.
battleCry:
No hesitation!
I'll fulfill my duty!
victoryCryDuel: I cannot lose! The land needs me!
victoryCryBattle: I am Zhao Zilong! Surrender now!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Zhang Song
lore:
Liu Zhang's officer. Ugly and uncouth
but brilliant. When Cao Cao mocked him,
Zhang Song recited his treatise word for
word from memory. He later invited Liu
Bei to take Yi Province, but was
executed when his plot was discovered.
battleCry:
That book? In Shu, even
children know it by heart.
victoryCryBattle: Even a child of Shu could win this.

skill.name: Guide to Shu
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Zhang Fei
lore:
A warrior worth a thousand, Guan Yu's
equal. When Cao Cao attacked with a
million men, Zhang Fei fled with Liu
Bei. But at Changban Bridge, he stood
alone, bellowing at the enemy. The
terrified Wei army retreated, and Liu
Bei escaped.
battleCry:
Worth ten thousand men!
Don't underestimate Zhang Fei!
victoryCryBattle: Carve my name into your soul!

skill.name: Provoke
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Zhang Fei
lore:
A hero who swore the Peach Garden Oath
with Liu Bei and Guan Yu. Rough and hard
on his men, but devoted to Liu Bei
through every hardship. Wielding a four
meter serpent spear, he was said to be
worth ten thousand men.
battleCry:
I'm Zhang Fei!
Anyone who wants to die, come at me!
victoryCryBattle: I'm Zhang Fei! You want to die?!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Zhao Lei
lore:
An officer under Guan Yu at Jing
Province. When Lu Meng's army closed in,
he holed up at Maicheng with Guan Yu. To
deceive the enemy, he filled the walls
with banners and dummies, then attempted
a desperate escape with just a few dozen
riders.
battleCry:
A retainer's duty is
to give his best at all times!
victoryCryBattle: This land is ours. Withdraw.

skill.name: Wheel Tutor
skill.description: Increases POW of Spear ally with highest POW except yourself and performs invincible spear attacks in all directions. You die on activation.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
Spear units attack all directions

name: Ma Su
lore:
A Shu general immortalized in the saying
'to weep as you execute Ma Su.' Though
Zhuge Liang's disciple, he was
overconfident. At Jieting, he ignored
orders and camped on a hilltop, leading
to defeat. Zhuge Liang tearfully had him
executed.
battleCry:
Not even the Chancellor
could understand my strategy.
victoryCryDuel: You had no chance against me.
victoryCryBattle: Worth ignoring orders to attack!

skill.name: Provoke
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Ma Dai
lore:
Ma Chao's cousin, humble and diligent,
unlike his flashy relative. Zhuge
Liang's dying order: 'Serve as Wei Yan's
deputy quietly.' When Wei Yan rebelled
and cried 'Who can slay me?', Ma Dai
struck him down, ending the revolt.
battleCry:
Wei Yan!
The one to slay you is right here!
victoryCryBattle: The rebellion has been prevented.

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Ma Chao
lore:
One of Shu's Five Tiger Generals. From
youth, he fought alongside his father Ma
Teng in many battles. After rebelling
against Cao Cao and losing, he joined
Liu Bei. He served with distinction in
the Shu campaign and at Hanzhong.
battleCry:
Before Ma Chao the Splendid,
any foe becomes a corpse!
victoryCryBattle: Raise the banner! Victory is ours!

skill.name: Silver Lion
skill.description: POW and SPD and Charge damage increase.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD and
Charge damage increase

name: Ma Chao
lore:
One of Shu's Five Tiger Generals. At 17
he slew an enemy commander, earning the
name 'Ma Chao the Splendid.' After
losing to Cao Cao, he fled and fought
Zhang Fei to a draw. Persuaded to join
Liu Bei, he distinguished himself at
Hanzhong.
battleCry:
You dare?
Nothing can't be cut by my blade!
victoryCryDuel: None can stop my flashing spear!
victoryCryBattle: Behold my power!

skill.name: 1000-Man Slayer
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases and you can't be targeted by enemy Skills.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
can't be targeted by enemy Skills

name: Ma Liang
lore:
Ma Su's elder brother. The best among
five talented siblings, his white
eyebrows gave rise to the phrase 'best
of the white eyebrows.' He served as
envoy to Sun Quan and pacified tribes,
aiding Liu Bei with his many talents.
battleCry: Leave this to White Brow.
victoryCryBattle: Leave it to White Brow.

skill.name: Line Revival
skill.description: Revives 1 dead ally. If 2+ are dead selection is random. Unit revives where it died. Units that died in enemy territory revive in yours.

name: Lady Mi
lore:
Liu Bei's wife and Mi Zhu's sister. At
Changban, she fled with the infant Liu
Shan but injured her leg. To not slow
Zhao Yun, she entrusted the child to him
and threw herself into a well.
battleCry:
Lord Zhao Yun, please
take care of this child...!
victoryCryBattle: Someday, peace will come...

skill.name: Field Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) When either side kills a Unit that side's Castle takes damage.
skill.shortDescription:
[Dance] Killing Units
damages that side's Castle

name: Fa Zheng
lore:
A Shu strategist. With Zhang Song, he
urged Liu Bei to take Yi Province. At
Mt. Dingjun, he and Huang Zhong
outmaneuvered Xiahou Yuan, securing
Hanzhong. But he also abused his power
to take petty revenge, a dark side to
his nature.
battleCry:
Heh heh heh...
All according to plan. Attack!
victoryCryBattle: One shows their hand at the end.

skill.name: Wheel Command
skill.description: Ally POW in range increases and Spear units perform invincible spear attacks in all directions.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
Spear units attack all directions

name: Pang Tong
lore:
The Fledgling Phoenix, peer to Zhuge
Liang. He joined Liu Bei's Shu campaign,
winning with brilliant strategy. But at
Falling Phoenix Slope, having swapped
horses with Liu Bei, he was mistaken for
his lord and slain.
battleCry:
Falling Phoenix Slope...
What an ominous name.
victoryCryBattle: Time for the phoenix chick to fly.

skill.name: Chain Ploy+
skill.description: Lowers SPD of enemies in range.

name: Meng Da
lore:
A general famous more for betrayal than
valor. He betrayed Liu Zhang to help Liu
Bei take Shu, then defected to Wei. When
he tried to rebel there too, Sima Yi saw
through him and killed him.
battleCry:
The winds seem to be
blowing this way now.
victoryCryDuel: You should have betrayed them too...
victoryCryBattle: I am the true victor here!

skill.name: Rebel Signal
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. On activation one of your Units on battlefield dies. Effect is weaker if no Units can die.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
1 ally dies on activation

name: Liu Bei
lore:
The hero of the Three Kingdoms. With
rare charisma, he won over warriors and
sages alike, from Guan Yu to Zhang Fei,
fighting to restore Han. After wandering
many battlefields, he finally conquered
Shu and became Emperor.
battleCry:
Come with me.
Let's use your strength for the realm.
victoryCryBattle: I shall restore the Han dynasty!

skill.name: Liu Bei Virtue
skill.description: Increases POW of all Shu allies in range.

name: Liu Bei
lore:
The hero of the Three Kingdoms, risen
from the volunteer militia. While
seeking to fight the Yellow Turbans, Liu
Bei met Zhang Fei and Guan Yu. The three
swore brotherhood in the Peach Garden,
beginning their fight for the realm.
battleCry:
We swear to Heaven:
though born on different days,
we wish to die as one!
victoryCryBattle: Know the power of virtue!

skill.name: Peach Oath
skill.description: Greatly increases POW of allies in range. However if any Unit dies all affected allies die.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases but if 1 dies
all affected allies die

name: Liu Feng
lore:
Liu Bei's adopted son. When Meng Da
defected and urged 'Liu Bei will kill
you to make way for his real son; join
Wei,' Liu Feng refused. He showed
unwavering loyalty and trust in his
adoptive father.
battleCry:
My adoptive father
isn't that kind of petty man!
victoryCryDuel: I can do it if I try!
victoryCryBattle: Father! I did it!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Liao Hua
lore:
Once a Yellow Turban remnant. He joined
Guan Yu during the Five Passes escape
and served as his right hand. After Guan
Yu's death, he often led the vanguard.
He lived long, fighting from the Yellow
Turban era to Shu's fall.
battleCry:
An ordinary general like me
can only keep fighting!
victoryCryDuel: Decades of war weren't for nothing!
victoryCryBattle: No longer just an average general!

skill.name: Fury Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and HP recovers.

name: Kan Ze
lore:
A Wu strategist from a poor family. His
brilliance caught Sun Quan's eye. At Red
Cliffs, he delivered the false
surrender. Though Cao Cao suspected
treachery, he talked his way through,
securing Wu's victory.
battleCry:
My plan is flawless.
I'll see it through to the end.
victoryCryBattle: My plan worked perfectly.

skill.name: Risk Recommend
skill.description: Increases INT of ally with highest POW on battlefield. However you die when effect activates.
skill.shortDescription:
INT increases
you die after effect

name: Han Dang
lore:
A Wu general and master of the glaive.
He served three generations of the Sun
family. Strict with discipline yet
inspirational, his troops were always in
high spirits and united. Until illness
took him, he devoted himself to Wu's
prosperity.
battleCry:
Never forget! Each of you
carries our nation's fate!
victoryCryDuel: This is why I love the battlefield!
victoryCryBattle: Too bad, it's over already.

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Gan Ning
lore:
A bold and cunning Wu general. He urged
Sun Quan to attack his former master
Huang Zu, then led the army that slew
him. At Ruxu, he raided Cao Cao's camp
with just 100 men, throwing the enemy
into chaos and winning a stunning
victory.
battleCry:
Oh, another battle?
Time for me to shine!
victoryCryBattle: Over already? I'm not satisfied!

skill.name: River Pirate
skill.description: Reduces POW damage to allies in range.

name: Gan Ning
lore:
A fierce Wu general. In youth he was a
river bandit, wild and lawless, but
reformed after reading classical texts.
He served Liu Biao and Huang Zu, but
neither valued him. So he joined Sun
Quan, slew Huang Zu, and became a
legend.
battleCry:
You're dead, pal.
The name's Gan Ning of Wu!
victoryCryDuel: Gyahaha! Think you can beat me?!
victoryCryBattle: Alright, where's the next battle?!

skill.name: Wu Valor
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Your POW increases.

name: Yu Fan
lore:
A Wu official known for speaking his
mind. He served as envoy in the war
against Guan Yu and was a master diviner
who predicted Guan Yu's death. But his
arrogance grated on Sun Quan, who
eventually demoted him.
battleCry:
Fools! You cower like caged birds.
How can you speak truth to power?
victoryCryBattle: Fools. You thought you could hold?

skill.name: Wu Flames
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Huang Gai
lore:
A veteran since Sun Jian's time. At Red
Cliffs, he proposed the Torture Scheme.
Feigning surrender, his fireships
crashed into Cao Cao's fleet, burning it
and winning the battle.
battleCry:
If my life alone can win
this war, it's a bargain!
victoryCryDuel: I won't die until we win!
victoryCryBattle: You let me through. You lose!

skill.name: Siege to Death
skill.description: Deals damage to enemy Castle. Can only use while your Siege gauge is active. You die after use.
skill.shortDescription:
Deals damage to enemy Castle
you die after effect

name: Lady Wu
lore:
Sun Jian's wife. From the noble Wu clan,
she supported her warrior husband in
politics. One of the era's finest wives,
she protected her young sons Sun Ce and
Sun Quan after his death.
battleCry:
Stand up straight!
Save your tears for after we win!
victoryCryBattle: Don't be satisfied with just this.

skill.name: Rally Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Your army's MP gain rate increases.

name: Zhou Tai
lore:
A warrior who rose through merit under
Sun Ce. Close in age to Sun Quan, he
served as bodyguard. When bandits
attacked at Xuancheng, he defended his
lord despite wounds. The countless scars
across his body became a warrior's badge
of honor.
battleCry:
Each of these hundred scars
is my pride!
victoryCryBattle: Another scar to add to my body.

skill.name: Han Pride
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. However you die when effect ends.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
you die after effect

name: Zhou Yu
lore:
A young genius who led Wu's military
after Sun Ce's death. He opened the
famed Battle of Red Cliffs, burning Cao
Cao's fleet of hundreds of thousands. He
devised the 'Divide the Realm' plan to
conquer Shu, but fell ill before
achieving it.
battleCry:
Even if my body fails,
I'll lead Wu's banner to glory!
victoryCryDuel: Good plan... until you targeted me.
victoryCryBattle: My flame shall not be extinguished!

skill.name: Chibi Inferno
skill.description: Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Zhu Huan
lore:
A Wu commander, more strategist than
warrior. His memory was legendary: he
knew ten thousand soldiers' families.
Against Cao Ren's army, he used the
'Empty Fort' trick, feigning abandonment
then ambushing them.
battleCry:
Victory isn't won by numbers,
but by a commander's skill!
victoryCryBattle: Victory is decided by the commander!

skill.name: Fire Ploy
skill.description: Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Zhu Zhi
lore:
A veteran from Sun Jian to Sun Quan.
Humble and sincere, he stayed with young
Sun Ce when others fled. He advised
trading the Imperial Seal to Yuan Shu
for troops. He served the Sun family to
the end.
battleCry:
I'll support you, young lord,
until you take the realm!
victoryCryBattle: Honored that I could be of help.

skill.name: Wu Prayer
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Recovers HP of allies in range.

name: Xiao Qiao
lore:
The younger of the 'Two Flowers of
Jiangdong.' She married Zhou Yu, who
would become Wu's pillar. The meeting of
the dashing Zhou Yu and the peerless
Xiao Qiao became the stuff of legend.
battleCry:
Lord Zhou Yu, please
protect our kingdom...!
victoryCryBattle: Tehe, that's wonderful!

skill.name: Meteor Ritual
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Deals damage to enemy Castle.

name: Jiang Qin
lore:
A retainer since Sun Ce's days. Under
Sun Quan, he defended his fleeing lord
against Zhang Liao's assault. He
recommended Xu Sheng despite past
grievances, never letting personal
matters cloud his judgment.
battleCry:
Out of my way, you fools!
Move it!
victoryCryBattle: Get outta my way, all of you!

skill.name: Weaken Bow
skill.description: Your POW increases and arrows lower enemy POW.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
arrows lower enemy POW

name: Zhuge Jin
lore:
Zhuge Liang's elder brother. He served
Sun Quan with absolute trust. A complete
official skilled in civil affairs,
diplomacy, and war. Fair and honest, he
refused to meet his brother privately
during official visits.
battleCry:
As my lord trusts me,
so I shall trust my lord.
victoryCryBattle: Glad I could meet your expectations.

skill.name: Swift Retreat
skill.description: Allies in range instantly return to Castle.

name: Xu Sheng
lore:
A general under Sun Quan. When Cao Cao
invaded Ruxu, a storm grounded Wu's
ships on enemy shores. While others
feared to disembark, Xu Sheng's troops
boldly charged into the enemy camp and
routed Wei's forces.
battleCry:
Fair warning:
I show no mercy to losers!
victoryCryBattle: Fell right into my trap!

skill.name: Summon Support
skill.description: [Summon] (Summons ally Unit with set behavior. Cannot use multiple summon Skills at once.) Summons 2 Support units.

name: Zu Mao
lore:
An officer under Sun Jian. When the
fierce Hua Xiong pursued Sun Jian at
Dong Zhuo's campaign, Zu Mao wore his
lord's red headdress as a decoy. Sun
Jian escaped, but Zu Mao died in the
ruse. He was said to wield twin blades.
battleCry:
I'll carve open the path
for my lord!
victoryCryDuel: My lord, I've cleared the path!
victoryCryBattle: My lord, victory is ours!

skill.name: Summon Decoy
skill.description: [Summon] (Summons ally Unit with set behavior. Cannot use multiple summon Skills at once.) Summons a Decoy.

name: Sun Huan
lore:
A Wu general. During Liu Bei's invasion,
he defended Wu alongside Lu Xun.
Surrounded by Shu's overwhelming force,
Sun Huan fought fearlessly and repelled
them. He then cut off Liu Bei's retreat
routes, nearly capturing him.
battleCry:
You'll know the terror
of having no escape.
victoryCryDuel: Best way to break their ranks!
victoryCryBattle: Win as you should. This is war!

skill.name: Fire Ploy
skill.description: Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Sun Jian
lore:
Father of Sun Ce and Sun Quan. He led
the Coalition's vanguard against Dong
Zhuo. After Dong Zhuo fled, he found the
Imperial Seal and knew he was destined
for greatness. He died to a stray arrow
fighting Huang Zu.
battleCry:
Forward, men!
Destiny is mine!
victoryCryBattle: Everyone, forward! Destiny is ours!

skill.name: Divine Vision
skill.description: Greatly increases POW of allies in range. However affected Units die when effect ends.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases
they die after effect

name: Sun Quan
lore:
Lord of Wu, Sun Jian's second son and
Sun Ce's brother. He inherited their
legacy young. With broad vision and
decisive judgment, he ruled Jiangdong
skillfully. At Red Cliffs, he gambled
his nation's fate and won a historic
victory.
battleCry:
Cao Cao! You underestimated me.
That's why you lost!
victoryCryDuel: Got heated. Runs in the blood.
victoryCryBattle: Victory! Raise the banner of Wu high!

skill.name: Young King Art
skill.description: Increases POW of all Wu allies in range.

name: Sun Ce
lore:
Sun Jian's eldest, Sun Quan's brother.
Called the Little Conqueror. A genius
who conquered the south in his youth,
founding Wu. As he prepared to march
north, an assassin's poisoned arrow cut
him down.
battleCry:
Heaven! Would you have me
die in a place like this!?
victoryCryDuel: Well fought! But not enough for me!
victoryCryBattle: Don't dawdle! On to the next battle!

skill.name: Conqueror Fury
skill.description: Your POW and SPD greatly increase. However you die when effect ends.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase
you die after effect

name: Sun Ce
lore:
Sun Jian's eldest son. After his
father's death, he borrowed troops from
Yuan Shu. Led by Sun Ce and Zhou Yu, his
army won victory after victory. His
valor and charisma earned him the title
'Little Conqueror.'
battleCry:
Stand aside!
Once I'm fired up, I show no mercy!
victoryCryBattle: None but me can stop my war!

skill.name: Soaring Time
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Your POW greatly increases and SPD increases.

name: Sun Ren
lore:
Liu Bei's wife and Sun Quan's sister,
married for political alliance. Bold and
skilled in combat, she kept maids armed
with naginata at her side. Even the
great Liu Bei was said to be nervous
around her.
battleCry:
Come on, you're supposed to
be a great hero, right?
Straighten up!
victoryCryBattle: I won't lose that easily!

skill.name: Fury Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and HP recovers.

name: Da Qiao
lore:
The elder of the 'Two Flowers of
Jiangdong,' famed alongside her sister
as peerless beauties. Cao Cao coveted
them both, but Da Qiao married the hero
Sun Ce.
battleCry:
Lord Sun Ce,
I await your return...
victoryCryBattle: The sky is beautiful today...

skill.name: Grand Meteor
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Deals damage to enemy Castle.

name: Taishi Ci
lore:
A Wu general who fought Sun Ce in fierce
single combat then pledged loyalty. Even
when freed, he gathered his scattered
troops and returned to Sun Ce. From then
on, he fought at the front as one of
Wu's finest warriors.
battleCry:
Lord Sun Ce!
My life is yours!
victoryCryBattle: Now rot where you fell!

skill.name: Promise Troops
skill.description: [Summon] (Summons ally Unit with set behavior. Cannot use multiple summon Skills at once.) Summons a Support unit.

name: Taishi Ci
lore:
A Wu general who fought Sun Ce in single
combat then swore loyalty. Known as a
master archer who never missed. He
continued as one of Wu's finest after
Sun Ce's death, until he fell at the
Battle of Hefei.
battleCry:
Those who know nothing of war
have no chance against me.
victoryCryDuel: Pointless. You could never beat me.
victoryCryBattle: This castle will make a fine trophy.

skill.name: Paralyze Arrow
skill.description: Your POW and bow range increase and arrows slow enemies hit.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and range increase and
arrows slow enemies

name: Zhang Hong
lore:
A Wu advisor, one of the 'Two Zhangs'
alongside Zhang Zhao. When news of Sun
Ce's death reached him during a mission
to Cao Cao, he talked Cao Cao out of
attacking Wu. He returned to advise Sun
Quan for many years.
battleCry:
A king's way is to grant favors,
not nurse grudges.
victoryCryBattle: Let us guide our lord to greatness.

skill.name: Purify Ploy
skill.description: Removes enemy Skill effects from allies in range.

name: Zhang Zhao
lore:
One of the 'Two Zhangs' alongside Zhang
Hong. He answered Sun Ce's invitation.
After Sun Ce's death, he followed his
dying wish to support Sun Quan.
Stubborn, he clashed often with his
lord; when ignored, he refused to leave
his house.
battleCry:
Honestly, my lord
gives me nothing but trouble!
victoryCryBattle: Such troublesome affairs...

skill.name: Rebuild Fence
skill.description: Restores one destroyed fence.

name: Chen Wu
lore:
A general with an eerie yellow face and
red eyes. A veteran who fought across
many battlefields since Sun Ce's time.
He led the fourth fleet at Red Cliffs.
Later, dueling Pang De, he was cornered
in the brush and slain.
battleCry:
Me... fight hard...
crush enemy... for lord...
victoryCryBattle: Me do good!

skill.name: Han Pride
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. However you die when effect ends.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
you die after effect

name: Cheng Pu
lore:
A veteran who served three generations
of the Sun family. As Wu's eldest
general, he was respectfully called
'Elder Cheng.' At Red Cliffs he served
as Zhou Yu's deputy. Initially
resentful, he came to deeply respect
Zhou Yu's brilliance.
battleCry:
Charge!
Now we take Cao Cao's head!
victoryCryBattle: This is true strength.

skill.name: Far Bow
skill.description: Your POW and bow range increase.

name: Ding Feng
lore:
He honed his skills under talents like
Gan Ning, Lu Xun, and Pan Zhang. He
fought at Red Cliffs, Jing Province, and
Yiling, earning many honors. When Wei
invaded after Sun Quan's death, he
routed 100,000 with just 3,000 men.
battleCry:
As a general, I can't show
an unsightly battle!
victoryCryDuel: A general won't fall to rabble!
victoryCryBattle: This much is expected of a general.

skill.name: Paralyze Arrow
skill.description: Your POW and bow range increase and arrows slow enemies hit.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and range increase and
arrows slow enemies

name: Dong Xi
lore:
A Wu general, brave and fiercely loyal.
Against Huang Zu, he braved a rain of
arrows to secure victory. At Hefei, he
stayed on a sinking ship to the last,
protecting Sun Quan's escape. He died on
that ship.
battleCry:
I'll protect my lord's life
with my last breath!
victoryCryBattle: Sometimes offense is the best defense.

skill.name: Guard Tactics
skill.description: Reduces POW damage taken.

name: Pan Zhang
lore:
A brave Wu general. At Jing Province,
following Lu Meng's plan, he captured
Guan Yu and his son Guan Ping. He
claimed Guan Yu's famed Green Dragon
Blade, but at Yiling, Guan Xing
recognized it and slew him.
battleCry:
Lord Guan Yu, this legendary blade...
I'll be taking it!
victoryCryDuel: So this is the Green Dragon's edge!
victoryCryBattle: Hahaha! What incredible power!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Lu Kang
lore:
Lu Xun's son. At 20, after his father's
death, he commanded 5,000 troops. Modest
and trusted, he and Jin's Yang Hu
respected each other as foes, exchanging
gifts of wine and medicine. Their border
remained peaceful.
battleCry: Even enemies can become friends.
victoryCryDuel: Am I getting closer to Father?
victoryCryBattle: A battle worthy of Father's name.

skill.name: Skirmish Lead
skill.description: Increases POW of allies in range.

name: Lu Xun
lore:
A young genius who saved Wu, skilled in
both war and letters. At Yiling, when
Liu Bei invaded to avenge Guan Yu, Lu
Xun was made commander. He burned Liu
Bei's army to ashes, then repelled Wei's
opportunistic attack. Wu remained
secure.
battleCry:
Endure the crisis,
and victory will reveal itself.
victoryCryDuel: I won't forget you as a commander.
victoryCryBattle: While I stand, we won't lose!

skill.name: Sun Tzu Order
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Increases POW of all Wu allies in range.

name: Ling Cao
lore:
A fierce general under Sun Ce and Ling
Tong's father. Always at the vanguard.
When attacking Huang Zu, he fell to an
arrow from Gan Ning, then in Huang Zu's
service. This created a lasting feud
between Ling Tong and Gan Ning.
battleCry:
A veteran's might...
I'll carve it into you!
victoryCryDuel: Not bad, but still too green!
victoryCryBattle: Now, on to the next battlefield!!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Ling Tong
lore:
At 15, he braved the battlefield to
retrieve his father's remains. He
defended Sun Quan from Zhang Liao at
Hefei. When enemies destroyed the
bridge, he fought until Sun Quan
crossed, then dove into the river to
survive.
battleCry:
Drop your weapons
if you wanna live!
victoryCryDuel: Never cross blades with me again!
victoryCryBattle: Drop your weapons if you want to live!

skill.name: Wu Valor
skill.description: [Focus] (Activates after holding Skill button. Cannot be countered.) Your POW increases.

name: Lu Fan
lore:
A retainer from Sun Ce's youth, highly
trusted. After Sun Ce died, he helped
Zhou Yu and Cheng Pu support Sun Quan.
He arranged the marriage between Liu Bei
and Sun Ren and plotted to assassinate
Liu Bei, though he failed.
battleCry:
This way, Lord Liu Bei.
Right this way.
victoryCryBattle: My support has been worthwhile.

skill.name: Weaken Bow
skill.description: Your POW increases and arrows lower enemy POW.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
arrows lower enemy POW

name: Lu Meng
lore:
One of Wu's greatest strategists. After
Lu Su's death, he led the campaign to
take Jing Province. Feigning illness, he
swapped with the unknown Lu Xun to lull
Guan Yu. Then he turned Fu Shiren and Mi
Fang, isolating and capturing Guan Yu.
battleCry:
Guan Yu's destiny is at an end.
Take him down!
victoryCryDuel: You let your guard down, fool!
victoryCryBattle: Seems you got careless.

skill.name: Paralyze Order
skill.description: Ally POW in range increases and Bow units slow enemies hit by arrows.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
Bow units slow enemies hit

name: Lu Su
lore:
A famed Wu strategist from a wealthy
family. Recommended by Zhou Yu, he
proposed the 'Divide the Realm' strategy
to Sun Quan. To counter Cao Cao, he
urged alliance with Liu Bei and served
as diplomat, forging the pact between Wu
and Shu.
battleCry:
So that's how it is.
I humbly ask for your cooperation.
victoryCryBattle: That went well.

skill.name: Summon Charger
skill.description: [Summon] (Summons ally Unit with set behavior. Cannot use multiple summon Skills at once.) Summons a Charger.

name: Yu Ji
lore:
A mystic revered by the people. Sun Ce
captured him as a 'deceiver of hearts.'
Told to make it rain for pardon, he did,
but was executed anyway. His ghost
haunted Sun Ce and cursed him to death.
battleCry:
Fo fo fo...
Receive my curse!
victoryCryBattle: Hohoho, you let me win.

skill.name: Water Bane
skill.description: Deals water damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Yuan Shu
lore:
Yuan Shao's brother. Heir to the Yuan
clan, he led vast armies. But declaring
himself emperor lost him all support.
Defeated by Liu Bei, he fled, muttering
about honey, and died vomiting blood.
battleCry:
Hee hee hee... I am Emperor.
Emperor...!
victoryCryBattle: All hail the Emperor's victory!

skill.name: Self-Destruct
skill.description: Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs. You die after effect.
skill.shortDescription:
Deals fire damage
you die after effect

name: Jia Xu
lore:
A strategist under Dong Zhuo. When Lu Bu
killed Dong Zhuo, he rallied the
remnants and drove Lu Bu from Changan.
Li Jue feared his talent, so he fled and
became Zhang Xiu's advisor, nearly
killing Cao Cao with his schemes.
battleCry: Heh... my plans never fail.
victoryCryBattle: I never make mistakes.

skill.name: Death Ploy
skill.description: Lowers POW of enemies in range. Dying during effect increases Revive time.
skill.shortDescription:
Lowers POW. Dying during
effect delays Revive

name: Hua Xiong
lore:
Dong Zhuo's foremost general. Nine feet
tall with a fearsome visage: tiger body,
wolf waist, leopard head. As vanguard,
he smashed the Coalition, slaying
champion after champion and throwing the
allied lords into panic.
battleCry:
Cry and beg for mercy,
dogs of the Han throne!
victoryCryBattle: Beg for mercy, you beaten dogs!

skill.name: Demon Blade
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. However damages your Castle during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
damages your Castle during effect

name: Ji Ling
lore:
Yuan Shu's general. He dueled Guan Yu
for 30 bouts to a draw, proof of his
skill. But while escorting Yuan Shu in
retreat, Liu Bei ambushed them and Zhang
Fei cut him down.
battleCry:
I am Ji Ling,
Yuan Shu's foremost general!
victoryCryDuel: A pity. I wanted your strength.
victoryCryBattle: Drop your weapons! I'll spare you!

skill.name: Mass Assault
skill.description: Your POW increases. Effect is greater the more ally Units on battlefield.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
greater effect with more allies

name: Yan
lore:
Lu Bu's wife. When Cao Cao besieged
Xiapi, Chen Gong urged Lu Bu to sally
out and strike from behind. But Lady Yan
refused to be left behind with Chen
Gong, and Lu Bu dropped the plan. After
Lu Bu died, she was sent to the capital.
battleCry:
Hold on, Fengxian!
You're leaving me behind?
victoryCryBattle: Ufufu, I'll take what's mine~

skill.name: Ruin Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Continuously damages both your Castle and enemy Castle.

name: Gao Shun
lore:
Lu Bu's chief general after
independence. He led the 'Camp Crusher'
elite, never failing to take an enemy
position. He defeated Liu Bei and Xiahou
Dun in turn, but refused surrender and
died alongside Lu Bu.
battleCry:
Death to the weak!
None can stop my charge!
victoryCryBattle: This is why they call us Trapped Camp!

skill.name: Siege Camp
skill.description: POW and Siege power and fence damage increase. POW increase is greater the lower your Castle gauge.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and Siege and
fence damage increase

name: Gongsun Zan
lore:
Governor of Beiping. A fellow student
with Liu Bei, he once sheltered him. He
earned fame as the 'White Horse General'
crushing northern tribes with his
cavalry. He fought Yuan Shao for
northern dominance but lost and took his
own life.
battleCry:
Ha ha, Yuan Shao!
You can't touch my White Horse cavalry!
victoryCryDuel: Heh, I am the White Horse General!
victoryCryBattle: Before my cavalry, you're but children!

skill.name: White Horse
skill.description: Increases SPD of all allies in range.

name: Hu Cheer
lore:
Zhang Xiu's warrior, the bravest in his
army. During the night raid on Cao Cao,
he stole Dian Wei's halberd, and without
it, Dian Wei fell. Said to be so strong
he could carry 500 jin and walk 700 li
in a day.
battleCry:
This Hu Che'er...
never lets his prey escape!
victoryCryBattle: That's about how it goes.

skill.name: Death Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and enemies killed during effect take longer to Revive.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
killed enemies take longer to Revive

name: Zuo Ci
lore:
A mysterious hermit who told Cao Cao to
yield to Liu Bei, enraging him. Cao Cao
hunted him but caught hundreds with the
same face. When all were executed, smoke
rose and Zuo Ci appeared on a crane,
prophesied Cao Cao's death, and
vanished.
battleCry:
Foolish King of Wei!
Know your fate!
victoryCryBattle: Fools! You wouldn't heed my words!

skill.name: Transform Art
skill.description: Your POW becomes equal to enemy Lord with highest POW. Includes bonuses from Skills.
skill.shortDescription:
POW equals the enemy
with highest POW

name: Lady Zou
lore:
Wife of Zhang Xiu's uncle Zhang Ji. A
rare beauty who bewitched Cao Cao when
he came to subdue Zhang Xiu. Besotted,
Cao Cao was ambushed. He barely escaped,
but lost his son and many capable
officers.
battleCry:
Even the greatest hero
is just a man before me...
victoryCryDuel: That weak? I can't fall for you~
victoryCryBattle: Get stronger if you want my heart.

skill.name: Bitter Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Each time an ally dies ally POW increases for a time.
skill.shortDescription:
[Dance] POW increases
each time an ally dies

name: Zhang Jiao
lore:
Leader of the Way of Peace that shook
China. With mystical arts, he wielded
power beyond men. As General of Heaven,
he led millions in revolt. Crushed in
months, his rebellion triggered the
dynasty's fall.
battleCry:
The Azure Heaven is dead!
The Yellow Heaven shall rise!
victoryCryDuel: I am heaven's will. You cannot win.
victoryCryBattle: Yellow Turbans! Seek the age of peace!

skill.name: YT Rebellion
skill.description: Revives all dead allies and increases their POW. However you die after activation.
skill.shortDescription:
Revives all and increases POW
you die after activation

name: Zhang Xun
lore:
Yuan Shu's Grand General. When Yuan Shu
attacked Lu Bu over a broken marriage,
Zhang Xun was given 200,000 men. But
Chen Gui's schemes turned allies against
him and he suffered defeat. After Yuan
Shu died, he surrendered to Cao Cao.
battleCry:
You dare advise a Grand General?
Ten years too early!
victoryCryDuel: I am the Grand General! Glorious!
victoryCryBattle: I am the Grand General! Renowned!

skill.name: Mass Produce
skill.description: Revives all dead ally Rams. Also increases SPD of revived Units.
skill.shortDescription: Revives all Rams and boosts SPD

name: Zhang Xiu
lore:
Served Dong Zhuo, then went independent
and fought Cao Cao. He surrendered once,
but rebelled when Cao Cao took his
uncle's widow as concubine. Eventually,
on Jia Xu's advice, he surrendered again
and became Cao Cao's general.
battleCry: Now! Corner Cao Cao!
victoryCryBattle: Nothing can stop this momentum!

skill.name: Pure Evil
skill.description: Your POW increases. However damages your Castle during effect. POW increase is greater the lower your Castle gauge.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
damages your Castle during effect

name: Diao Chan
lore:
One of China's Four Great Beauties,
alongside Yang Guifei. She became Lu
Bu's concubine as part of a plot, using
her charms to turn him against his lord
Dong Zhuo. A beauty who 'toppled
kingdoms,' she succeeded in toppling
one.
battleCry:
Come, Lord Lu Bu...
Let us take everything together.
victoryCryBattle: Get too close and you'll get burned.

skill.name: Ruinous Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Continuously deals damage to enemy Castle.
skill.shortDescription:
[Dance] Continuously deals
damage to enemy Castle

name: Zhang Liao
lore:
Lu Bu's general. Highly skilled, he
served many lords before joining Lu Bu,
becoming one of his two greatest
alongside Gao Shun. When Lu Bu fell, he
cursed Cao Cao seeking death, but was
spared and made a general.
battleCry:
My valor and horsemanship...
only Lord Lu Bu surpasses them!
victoryCryDuel: Fool! You can't match my cavalry!
victoryCryBattle: With might, I shall conquer all!

skill.name: Like Chiyou
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase. POW continues to increase while maintaining Charge state during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase
POW grows while charging

name: Zhang Liang
lore:
Zhang Jiao's youngest brother, calling
himself General of Humanity. He led
uprisings across the land. When Zhang
Jiao died of illness, he took command,
but the emboldened government forces
overwhelmed him and he was slain.
battleCry:
We will create
the Yellow Turban era!
victoryCryDuel: Weakling! You're no match for me!
victoryCryBattle: We shall create the Yellow Turban era!

skill.name: YT Swarm
skill.description: Your HP recovers.

name: Zhang Lu
lore:
Leader of the Five Pecks of Rice sect,
named for their offering. He built an
independent state in Hanzhong and held
it 30 years. When Cao Cao invaded, he
surrendered peacefully, leaving
treasuries intact and winning praise.
battleCry: Come, eat this rice. Heh heh.
victoryCryBattle: Come, let us share rice together.

skill.name: Five Pecks Way
skill.description: Revives 1 dead Rogue ally. If 2+ Units are dead selection is random. Revived Unit appears in your Castle.

name: Chen Gong
lore:
Lu Bu's strategist. He first served Cao
Cao, but disillusioned by newcomers
rising above him and the Xu Province
massacre, he defected to Lu Bu. Captured
with Lu Bu, he was executed, but Cao Cao
wept at the loss of such talent.
battleCry:
Cao Cao! I'll master these wolves
and destroy you!
victoryCryBattle: With me here, victory is certain!

skill.name: Ruin Counsel
skill.description: Increases POW of ally with highest POW. However damages your Castle during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases
but damages your Castle

name: Chen Lan
lore:
Yuan Shu's officer. He served under Ji
Ling against Liu Bei. Disgusted by Yuan
Shu's excess, he fled with Lei Bo to
become a bandit. When Yuan Shu lost to
Liu Bei, he raided the battlefield to
loot supplies.
battleCry:
Forget it!
Just abandon Yuan Shu!
victoryCryBattle: Grab the loot and let's scram!

skill.name: Lance Tactics
skill.description: Speed increases. However you are forced to move forward during effect.

name: Cheng Yuanzhi
lore:
A Yellow Turban general and Liu Bei's
first real opponent. Despite being one
of the strongest Turbans, he was slain
by Guan Yu in a single blow. Without
their leader, the Turbans fell apart and
lost to Liu Bei's volunteers.
battleCry:
Pathetic rabble!
I'll rust my blade on you!
victoryCryBattle: Nailed it!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Dong Zhuo
lore:
The demon king who ended the Han.
Placing Emperor Xian on the throne, he
seized absolute power. With brutal laws
and savage punishments, he slaughtered
tens of thousands of innocents. Luoyang
became a living hell under his reign.
battleCry:
400 years of Han dynasty...
I'll devour it all!
victoryCryDuel: I don't let defiant fools live.
victoryCryBattle: Now... roast or boil? Decisions...

skill.name: Tyrant's Path
skill.description: Ally POW and SPD in range increase. However damages your Castle during effect based on number of affected Units.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW and SPD increase
damages your Castle during effect

name: Dong Bai
lore:
Granddaughter of Dong Zhuo, the tyrant
who destroyed the Han. Even as a young
girl, her grandfather gave her territory
and showered her with every luxury
imaginable.
battleCry:
You asked for it!
I'm telling Grandpa on you!
victoryCryDuel: You thought you could touch me?
victoryCryBattle: I'll make you all my playthings!

skill.name: Block Retreat
skill.description: Prevents enemies in range from returning to their Castle.

name: Pei Yuanshao
lore:
Zhou Cang's partner, a Yellow Turban
remnant turned bandit. He volunteered to
serve Guan Yu with Zhou Cang but was
left to guard camp. Before Guan Yu
returned, he tried to steal Zhao Yun's
horse and was cut down in an instant.
battleCry:
Master Guan Yu's so cold...
Ooh, nice horse!
victoryCryBattle: Hey, was that my doing?

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Ma Yuanyi
lore:
A Yellow Turban under Zhang Jiao, sent
to scout Luoyang for the uprising. But a
disciple betrayed them to General He
Jin. Ma Yuanyi was captured and
executed, and Zhang Jiao, knowing the
secret was out, launched the rebellion
early.
battleCry: I'll lay Luoyang bare.
victoryCryDuel: Hehehe! Not bad for me, huh!
victoryCryBattle: Heh! I can do it when I try!

skill.name: Paralyze Arrow
skill.description: Your POW increases and arrows slow enemies hit.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
arrows slow enemies

name: Yang Hong
lore:
Yuan Shu's secretary. When Yuan Shu
planned to attack Sun Ce, he advised
'Attack Liu Bei instead; he's weaker.'
When Cao Cao invaded Shouchun, he urged
fleeing across the Huai rather than
fighting.
battleCry:
We can't beat Sun Ce,
but Liu Bei might be possible!
victoryCryBattle: This victory is quite surprising!

skill.name: Stealth
skill.description:
Your POW increases and you gain Stealth.
(Enemies can't see you. However you briefly appear when Ambush reveal conditions are met. Enemy Skills can still target you.)

name: Lei Bo
lore:
Yuan Shu's officer, yet when Yuan Shu
was crushed by Liu Bei, Lei Bo refused
to shelter him. Abandoning his lord, he
became a bandit in the mountains. When
Yuan Shu fled past, Lei Bo appeared and
robbed him.
battleCry:
Huff... wheeze...
So unlucky...
victoryCryBattle: Sometimes good things do happen...

skill.name: Lightning
skill.description: Drops 3 lightning bolts in range each dealing lightning damage to an enemy. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Li Guo
lore:
Dong Zhuo's officers and childhood
friends. Both were brutal. After Dong
Zhuo's death, they drove Lu Bu from
Changan. But greed ruled them, and they
eventually turned on each other and
faded into history.
battleCry:
Ha ha! The realm is mine, MINE!
Everything's mine to control!
victoryCryBattle: We'll suck you dry to the bone!

skill.name: Pure Evil
skill.description: Your POW increases. However damages your Castle during effect. POW increase is greater the lower your Castle gauge.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
damages your Castle during effect

name: Li Ru
lore:
Dong Zhuo's strategist, wed to his
daughter. Cold, cruel, ruthless. When
Dong Zhuo put Emperor Xian on the
throne, he poisoned the previous emperor
and his mother to tie up loose ends. He
also gave Xu Rong the strategy that
defeated Cao Cao.
battleCry:
Emperor, Empress Dowager, Cao Cao...
Kill anyone who defies us!
victoryCryBattle: Now, tremble in fear!

skill.name: Assassin Toxin
skill.description:
Gradually lowers HP of enemies in range.
Entering Castle removes this effect.
skill.shortDescription:
Gradually lowers HP
entering Castle cures poison

name: Lu Lingqi
lore:
Lu Bu's daughter. When Lu Bu and Yuan
Shu tried to seal their alliance with a
marriage, she, having her father's
blood, refused to meekly comply. Her
defiance sparked a war between them.
battleCry:
Being cute alone
won't survive the chaos!
victoryCryBattle: I carve my own destiny!

skill.name: Unrivaled+
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. Also recovers HP and increases SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase
HP recovers

name: Lu Bu
lore:
Despised as a 'wolf' for his betrayals,
yet hailed as 'Flying General' for his
might: the strongest warrior of the era.
With his halberd, he overwhelmed Guan
Yu, Zhang Fei, and Liu Bei all at once
at Hulao Pass. Truly a demon god of war.
battleCry:
I have no equal.
All who face me become corpses.
victoryCryBattle: Hahaha! None can match me!

skill.name: Unrivaled
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. Also recovers HP and increases SPD and INT.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD and INT increase
HP recovers

name: Jia Xu
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Once Zhang Xiu's
strategist who nearly killed Cao Cao.
After joining Cao Cao, he supported him
as tactician on countless battlefields.
battleCry:
The stratagems that pour
from my mind are limitless!
victoryCryBattle: My brilliant strategies are endless!

skill.name: Divide Ploy
skill.description: Lowers POW and INT and SPD of enemies in range. Effect is halved if only 1 Unit is targeted.
skill.shortDescription:
Lowers POW and INT and SPD
effect halved if only 1 target

name: Guo Jia
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' A pure strategist
serving Cao Cao. After contributing to
victories against Lu Bu and at Guandu,
he urged the campaign beyond the Wall.
Even dying, he thought only of the next
war.
battleCry:
I can't smell any
battle in you people.
victoryCryBattle: You don't smell like warriors to me.

skill.name: Flash Speed
skill.description: Ally POW in range briefly increases and Horse units also gain SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW briefly increases and
Horse units also gain SPD

name: Yue Jin
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Discovered by Cao
Cao as a common soldier, he rose to
general. Small but fearless and valiant,
he never retreated no matter the enemy
or their numbers.
battleCry: Nothing to it!
victoryCryBattle: All forces, advance!

skill.name: Power Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases.

name: Xiahou Yuan
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Xiahou Dun's cousin,
also from Cao Cao's first uprising. A
master archer who excelled at surprise
attacks. At Mt. Dingjun, he fought hard
but fell to Liu Bei's forces.
battleCry:
Let us raise a cup
to our kingdom of Wei!
victoryCryDuel: I stake everything on this battle!
victoryCryBattle: Wei and Cao Cao flow in my blood!

skill.name: Wild Shots
skill.description: Your POW increases and bow attacks all enemy Units in range.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases and
bow attacks all enemies in range

name: Xiahou Dun
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' The demon general
who lost an eye. He followed Cao Cao
from the first uprising, winning
countless battles. Close enough to call
Cao Cao by name, he always acted for his
lord's realm.
battleCry:
Xiahou Dun walks one road:
Mengde's dominion!
victoryCryDuel: I don't see dead men's dreams.
victoryCryBattle: Xiahou Dun walks one path: Cao Cao's!

skill.name: One Eye Roar
skill.description: Briefly stops enemies in range from moving. POW increases based on number of enemies. Speed also increases past a certain threshold.
skill.shortDescription:
Stops enemies and POW increases
SPD up past threshold

name: Xu Chu
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Captain of Cao Cao's
guard. Possessed of monstrous strength.
Always at Cao Cao's side: at Red Cliffs
he saved him from Gan Ning's attack, and
from Ma Chao's ambush.
battleCry:
The moon... there's definitely
more than one, y'know~
victoryCryDuel: You'll never pass me! Not ever!
victoryCryBattle: Huh? The moon ain't just one, right?

skill.name: Tiger Strength
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases.

name: Xun Yu
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Possessing 'royal
advisor' talent to guide a lord to
greatness. He served Cao Cao as
strategist during the Yellow Turban War.
He left briefly, traveled widely, then
returned to serve.
battleCry:
In strategy, fear not my lord.
