I decide by my mind alone.
victoryCryBattle: War has no constant form, like water.

skill.name: Mystery Counter
skill.description: [Deny] (Can only use when enemy uses Skill in range. Cannot counter a counter.) Negates enemy Skill and reflects damage-dealing Skills.

name: Xun You
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Xun Yu's nephew, yet
older. Modest but spirited, with
tenacious strategy. At Red Cliffs, he
held firm defenses against Wu even with
Cao Cao absent.
battleCry:
To see through the battle
before you... that is Cao Cao's advisor.
victoryCryBattle: I conquer the battle ahead. That's my role.

skill.name: Great Flood
skill.description: Deals water damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Xu Huang
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' Easygoing, with the
nickname 'Undefeated Xu Huang.' Fleet of
foot: at Guandu he rode back naked for
speed. He led armies at Red Cliffs,
Hanzhong, and Jing Province.
battleCry:
Hey ooo~!
The undefeated Xu Huang is here!
victoryCryBattle: My legend of invincibility continues!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Cao Ren
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' In youth he was not
trusted with an army, but he grew into a
great general. He distinguished himself
against Ma Chao and Guan Yu at Jing
Province.
battleCry:
This is the true essence
of Cao Ren!
victoryCryDuel: Know the wrath of the Four Pillars!
victoryCryBattle: All forces, mission complete!!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Cao Cao
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' A transcendent hero:
master of war, politics, and poetry.
Called 'Hero of Chaos,' he became King
of Wei but never claimed the throne of
Heaven.
battleCry:
My wars began from weakness
and grew to crush the strong.
victoryCryDuel: The battles ahead will be fierce.
victoryCryBattle: I rose from nothing to topple giants!

skill.name: Lord's Appeal
skill.description: Increases POW of all Wei allies in range.

name: Zhang Liao
lore:
From 'Souten Kouro' He served Lu Bu,
then after Lu Bu's death, joined Cao Cao
to pursue 'ultimate martial arts.' At
Hefei with few men, he nearly captured
Sun Quan and his vast army.
battleCry: I serve the mightiest.
victoryCryDuel: First time an enemy touched me...
victoryCryBattle: True might exists to defy destiny!

skill.name: Speed Order
skill.description: Ally POW in range increases and Horse units also gain SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
Ally POW increases and
Horse units also gain SPD

name: Ling Tong
lore:
Wu's vanguard captain. At Hefei, his
heroic fighting let Sun Quan escape, but
all 300 of his men died, and he barely
survived himself. Sun Quan trusted him
deeply, and openly wept when he heard of
Ling Tong's death.
battleCry:
Say your goodbyes now.
I'll cut you down in an instant!
victoryCryDuel: Whew! Thought I was done for!
victoryCryBattle: You're ready to die, right?!

skill.name: Vengeance
skill.description: Your POW increases. Effect is greater the more allies are dead.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
greater effect with more dead allies

name: Zhao Yun
lore:
One of Shu's Five Tiger Generals,
distinguished at Changban and Hanzhong.
After Liu Bei's death, he joined Zhuge
Liang's Northern Campaigns, rallying
troops and saving allies from defeat.
Always calm, he earned Zhuge Liang's
deep trust.
battleCry:
Shu's path to the realm...
my spear will carve it open!
victoryCryDuel: You were no match for my spear.
victoryCryBattle: With this momentum, we advance!

skill.name: Long Spear
skill.description: Your POW increases and spear lengthens.

name: Dian Wei
lore:
Cao Cao's bodyguard. A hero of unmatched
strength who always protected his lord.
Said to be impressive in appearance and
modest in temperament. Mounted on his
horse, he must have radiated an
overwhelming, invincible presence.
victoryCryBattle: WOOOOOOO!!

skill.name: Wei Elite
skill.description: Your POW increases for a long time.

name: Wang Yi
lore:
Wife of Governor Zhao Ang and one of the
era's great heroines. Against Ma Chao,
she fought in person. She contributed to
all nine stratagems that won the battle,
a fierce woman of both courage and
cunning.
battleCry:
Wolf of Xiliang...
I cannot allow your tyranny.
victoryCryBattle: The real test starts now.

skill.name: Water Bane
skill.description: Deals water damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Xu Chu
lore:
A Wei hero who guarded Cao Cao and saved
him from crisis many times. During the
war with Yuan Shao, assassins struck
when he was away, but a premonition
brought him running back in time to stop
them.
battleCry:
Come... I won't let you
past this point.
victoryCryDuel: Your courage to face me, noted.
victoryCryBattle: I'm proud to have fought you!

skill.name: Tiger Strength
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases.

name: Xu Huang
lore:
A famous general who earned merit at
Guandu and against Ma Chao under Cao
Cao. A steady hand who excelled at
intelligence operations, yet bold when
opportunity struck, pushing his men
without rest to pursue.
battleCry:
Now's the chance!
Pursue with all you've got! Keep up!
victoryCryDuel: This is the fastest way to win.
victoryCryBattle: Time to savor the taste of victory.

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Kuai Yue
lore:
Liu Biao's aide. After Liu Biao's death,
he advised his heir to surrender to Cao
Cao. It's said Cao Cao was happier to
gain Kuai Yue as a subordinate than to
gain all of Jing Province.
battleCry:
In peace, use benevolence.
In chaos, use stratagems.
victoryCryBattle: Is that all? How dull.

skill.name: Weaken Ploy
skill.description: Lowers POW of enemies in range.

name: Xiahou Yuan
lore:
Xiahou Dun's cousin, both served Cao Cao
from the start. When Cao Cao committed a
crime, Xiahou Yuan took his place, and
Cao Cao quickly rescued him. An
unstoppable warrior, but quick to anger;
Cao Cao never stopped warning him.
battleCry:
Mengde! This battle...
let me go first!
victoryCryBattle: Submit to our banner!

skill.name: Speed Extreme
skill.description: Your POW increases and SPD greatly increases.

name: Guan Yu
lore:
When Liu Bei was defeated by Cao Cao,
Guan Yu surrendered to protect Liu Bei's
wives, persuaded by Zhang Liao. He later
slew Yuan Shao's champion Yan Liang,
repaying his debt to Cao Cao, then
returned to Liu Bei, declining all
rewards.
battleCry:
All my strength,
I devote to my brother!
victoryCryDuel: Know the power of a god!
victoryCryBattle: Know the power of a god!

skill.name: Judgment Bolt
skill.description: Drops 4 lightning bolts in range each dealing lightning damage to an enemy. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Jiang Wei
lore:
Originally a Wei officer at Tianshui.
When Shu invaded, he saw through Zhuge
Liang's tactics and pushed back Zhao
Yun, but was finally captured. Zhuge
Liang said gaining Jiang Wei was 'like
gaining a phoenix.'
battleCry:
I must repay
the Chancellor's kindness!
victoryCryBattle: I have reasons I cannot lose!

skill.name: Prodigy Purge
skill.description: Greatly lowers POW and SPD of enemies in range.

name: Huang Yueying
lore:
Zhuge Liang's wife, a woman of rare
talent. She knew astronomy, geography,
and military texts like the Six Secret
Teachings. Especially gifted at
invention, she created many devices to
help her beloved husband.
battleCry:
Oh, welcome home dear.
Would you look at this?
victoryCryBattle: We won!

skill.name: Loyal Troops
skill.description: Recovers HP of allies in range. Can recover beyond max HP.

name: Gongsun Zan
lore:
One who joined the Coalition against
Dong Zhuo. Handsome and talented, he
studied classics under Lu Zhi. A friend
of Liu Bei from those days, he once lent
troops when Liu Bei went to save Xu
Province's people.
battleCry: Sorry to keep you waiting...
victoryCryBattle: Now none dare oppose us.

skill.name: Mass Assault
skill.description: Your POW increases. Effect is greater the more ally Units on battlefield.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
greater effect with more allies

name: Sima Yi
lore:
A Wei minister. In youth he studied
hard, earning recognition from the era's
sages. Summoned by Cao Cao, he won merit
against Zhang Lu and Wu. He had the
'wolf's glance': he could turn his head
180 degrees without moving his body.
battleCry:
He who thinks more, wins.
That's all there is to it.
victoryCryBattle: Haha! I always laugh last!

skill.name: Dispel Ploy
skill.description:
Removes enemy Skill effects from
enemy Units in range.

name: Zhou Cang
lore:
Once a Yellow Turban under Zhang Bao. At
first sight of Guan Yu, he was smitten
and became his right hand, following him
everywhere. When he heard Guan Yu had
been captured and executed by Wu, Zhou
Cang cut off his own head to follow.
battleCry:
Master Guan Yu!
I'll follow you anywhere!
victoryCryBattle: What a great fight!

skill.name: Fury Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and HP recovers.

name: Xiao Qiao
lore:
Zhou Yu's wife, Da Qiao's younger
sister. The two were known as the 'Two
Qiaos,' famed beauties. When Zhou Yu
heard Cao Cao's poem about 'enjoying the
Two Qiaos,' his rage steeled him to
fight at Red Cliffs.
battleCry: Everyone, please don't lose!
victoryCryBattle: Um... did I really win that?

skill.name: Purify Ploy
skill.description: Removes enemy Skill effects from allies in range.

name: Cao Zhang
lore:
Cao Cao's second son. Blessed with great
strength, he loved martial arts and even
wrestled wild beasts. Uninterested in
power, when Cao Cao died he brought
100,000 troops from Changan but handed
them to Cao Pi and returned home.
battleCry: Come! I'll take you on!
victoryCryBattle: YEAAAHHHH!!

skill.name: Kamikaze
skill.description: Your POW and Siege power increase but you are forced to move forward during effect.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and Siege up but
forced to move forward

name: Cao Pi
lore:
Cao Cao's second son, who became Wei's
first emperor. Inheriting his father's
talents, he mastered mounted archery at
8 and joined campaigns at 11. Also
brilliant, he served as Cao Cao's deputy
and defended Wei in his absence.
battleCry:
A kingdom for me.
Nothing else is needed.
victoryCryDuel: Such sloppy moves won't beat me.
victoryCryBattle: Now then, time to head back.

skill.name: Capital Troops
skill.description: Recovers HP of Wei allies in range.

name: Sun Ren
lore:
Sun Quan's younger sister. A warrior
skilled in martial arts, she married Liu
Bei for alliance. Bold yet happy with
her older husband. When she heard of Liu
Bei's death, she threw herself into the
Yangzi.
battleCry:
Underestimate me because I'm a
woman and you'll regret it!
victoryCryBattle: This is the best!

skill.name: Paralyze Arrow
skill.description: Your POW and bow range increase and arrows slow enemies hit.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and range increase and
arrows slow enemies

name: Taishi Ci
lore:
A fierce warrior who swore loyalty after
dueling Sun Ce. Even when freed after
capture, he gathered his scattered men
and returned to his new lord.
battleCry:
My dream of the emperor's throne,
I entrust it to you!
victoryCryBattle: Did small fry think they could win?

skill.name: Flawless
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases and INT and SPD also increase.
skill.shortDescription: POW and INT and SPD increase

name: Zhang Fei
lore:
Liu Bei and Guan Yu's sworn brother.
Quick to anger and rough, he often
caused trouble. When a corrupt official
demanded bribes, he whipped the man,
forcing them to flee. An outlaw, but
honest; beloved by his brothers and the
people alike.
battleCry:
Zhang Fei of Yan is here!
You won't pass this point!
victoryCryBattle: Remember the name Zhang Yide!

skill.name: Changban Roar
skill.description: Briefly stops enemies in range from moving. POW increases based on number of enemies. Speed also increases past a certain threshold.
skill.shortDescription:
Stops enemies and POW increases
SPD up past threshold

name: Ma Liang
lore:
A Shu advisor, Ma Su's brother. Best
among five talented brothers, his white
eyebrows gave rise to 'the white brow is
best.' Recommended by Yi Ji to serve Liu
Bei, he was at Baidicheng when Liu Bei
passed.
battleCry: My lord, please be patient.
victoryCryBattle: Enough already. Surrender.

skill.name: Guard Thunder
skill.description: Drops 5 lightning bolts in range each dealing lightning damage to an enemy. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Lu Xun
lore:
From a Jiangdong noble family. Skilled
in both war and wisdom. Starting with
defeating Guan Yu alongside Lu Meng, he
burned Shu's army at Yiling and repelled
every Wei invasion. His brilliant record
led to Grand Marshal and Chancellor.
battleCry:
While Lu Xun lives,
none shall tread on Wu soil!
victoryCryDuel: Unexpected, but I found my opening.
victoryCryBattle: Wu's wisdom cannot be broken by you.

skill.name: Yiling Flames
skill.description: Deals fire damage to enemies in range. Damage varies based on both INTs.

name: Lady Guo
lore:
Her father nicknamed her 'queen' for her
beauty. Orphaned young and made a
servant, Cao Cao found her and she
became Cao Pi's wife. Childless, she
adopted Cao Rui, son of the empress she
had murdered, who would take his
revenge.
battleCry: Ku ku ku... Now I am the Princess.
victoryCryBattle: Fufufu, it's all mine now.

skill.name: Inspire Dance
skill.description: [Dance] (Using this stops movement but effect lasts until you die.) Your army's MP gain rate increases.

name: Lady Gan
lore:
Liu Bei's second wife and Liu Shan's
mother. She became his consort at
Xiaopei. At Changban, Zhao Yun saved her
and Liu Shan from Cao Cao's army. She
supported Liu Bei quietly and died young
at Jing. Later, she was buried with Liu
Bei.
battleCry:
Oh my, what happened?
Another injury?
victoryCryBattle: Hehe, thanks for letting me win~

skill.name: Loyal Troops
skill.description: Recovers HP of allies in range. Can recover beyond max HP.

name: Chunyu Qiong
lore:
Once He Jin's subordinate, equal to Cao
Cao and Yuan Shao. When He Jin's forces
dissolved, he joined Yuan Shao. At
Guandu, he was caught drunk; his ears,
nose, and fingers were cut off. Yuan
Shao executed him for this disgrace.
battleCry:
My fine features
are surely Heaven's gift.
victoryCryDuel: Feel the pain of my wounds!!
victoryCryBattle: Know the agony of my scars!!

skill.name: Rebel Signal
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. On activation one of your Units on battlefield dies. Effect is weaker if no Units can die.
skill.shortDescription:
POW increases
1 ally dies on activation

name: Diao Chan
lore:
One of China's Four Beauties. Raised by
Wang Yun, she helped his scheme to drive
a wedge between Dong Zhuo and Lu Bu.
After Dong Zhuo's death, she stayed with
Lu Bu and was captured with him when he
fell to Cao Cao.
battleCry:
Lu Bu~
If you want to be with me,
you have to beat that guy!
victoryCryBattle: Get too close and you'll get burned.

skill.name: Provoke
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Ma Dai
lore:
Ma Teng's nephew, Ma Chao's cousin. When
Ma Teng was summoned by Cao Cao, he
warned it was a trap, but was ignored;
Ma Teng was killed. Fighting as Zhang
Lu's reinforcement, he wounded Wei Yan,
a grudge that would return.
battleCry: I will protect the Ma clan!
victoryCryDuel: I can't afford to lose here!
victoryCryBattle: Know the grudge of our clan!

skill.name: See Through
skill.description: [Deny] (Can only use when enemy uses Skill in range. Cannot counter a counter.) Negates enemy Skill activation.

name: Yue Jin
lore:
A homegrown Wei general. Small but
brave, always first into battle. At
Guandu he slew Chunyu Qiong; at Hefei
with Zhang Liao and Li Dian, he repelled
the Wu army.
battleCry:
Forward!
'Retreat' is not in my vocabulary!
victoryCryDuel: You thought you could stop me?!
victoryCryBattle: Retreat is not in my vocabulary!

skill.name: Speed Tactics
skill.description: Your POW and SPD increase.

name: Jiang Wei
lore:
Zhuge Liang's disciple, skilled in war
and letters. He once dueled Zhao Yun to
a draw. As Grand General after Zhuge
Liang's death, he continued the war
against Wei without great success. He
died plotting rebellion with Zhong Hui.
battleCry:
The mission to destroy Wei...
I accept it!
victoryCryDuel: Couldn't read my spear, could you?
victoryCryBattle: Battle's over. Tend the wounded.

skill.name: Provoke
skill.description: All enemies in range move toward you.

name: Sun Ren
lore:
Wife of Liu Bei and sister of Sun Quan.
Married for political alliance. Bold and
skilled, she kept armed maids at her
side. Even the great Liu Bei felt
nervous around her.
battleCry:
Come on, you're supposed to
be a great hero, right?
Straighten up!
victoryCryBattle: I won't lose so easily!

skill.name: Fury Tactics
skill.description: Your POW increases and HP recovers.

name: Lu Lingqi
lore:
Lu Bu's daughter. When Lu Bu and Yuan
Shu tried to seal their alliance through
marriage, she refused to comply. Her
defiance sparked a war.
battleCry:
Being cute alone
won't survive the chaos!
victoryCryBattle: I carve my own destiny!

skill.name: Unrivaled+
skill.description: Your POW greatly increases. Also recovers HP and increases SPD.
skill.shortDescription:
POW and SPD increase
HP recovers
